Notice Of Motion And Motion To Drop Matter From Arbitration Program Or Alternatively To Extend The Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction
Off Calendar May-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion to Drop Matter from Arbitration Program or Alternatively to Extend the Arbitrator's jurisdiction is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Jury Trial Date of 11/3/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. Court to give notice of trial date. Parties have agreed to Mediate Case. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause set on 8/27/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
